containerId.description: The identifier of the resource that contains the plan. Optional.

type.description: The type of the resource that contains the plan. For supported types, see the previous table. The possible values are: group, unknownFutureValue, roster. Use the Prefer: include-unknown-enum-members request header to get the following members in this evolvable enum: roster. Optional.

url.description: The full canonical URL of the container. Optional.
